parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS events_inbox (
  event_id text PRIMARY KEY,
  source text NOT NULL,
  event_type text NOT NULL,
  external_id text NOT NULL,
  occurred_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  received_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  correlation_id text,
  actor text,
  entity_type text,
  entity_id text,
  repo text,
  trello_card_id text,
  pull_request_number integer,
  commit_sha text,
  payload jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  normalized jsonb,
  processing_status text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  retry_count integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  last_error text
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS events_outbox (
  outbox_id bigserial PRIMARY KEY,
  event_id text,
  target text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'discord',
  action text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'notify',
  idempotency_key text,
  payload jsonb NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  status text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  retry_count integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  scheduled_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  sent_at timestamptz,
  last_error text,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);
ALTER TABLE events_inbox ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS processing_status text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';
ALTER TABLE events_inbox ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS retry_count integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE events_inbox ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_error text;
ALTER TABLE events_outbox ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS idempotency_key text;
ALTER TABLE events_outbox ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW();
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_events_inbox_status ON events_inbox (processing_status, received_at);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS events_outbox_idempotency_key_uq ON events_outbox (idempotency_key);
UPDATE events_inbox
SET processing_status = 'ingested', retry_count = retry_count + 1, last_error = 'Requeued stale processing event'
WHERE processing_status = 'processing'
  AND received_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
  AND retry_count < 3;
UPDATE events_inbox
SET processing_status = 'failed', last_error = COALESCE(last_error, 'Max router retries exceeded')
WHERE processing_status = 'processing'
  AND received_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
  AND retry_count >= 3;
UPDATE events_inbox
SET processing_status = 'skipped', last_error = 'Skipped by router: non-actionable unknown event'
WHERE processing_status = 'ingested'
  AND COALESCE(source, 'unknown') = 'unknown'
  AND COALESCE(event_type, 'unknown') = 'unknown'
  AND COALESCE(payload, '{}'::jsonb) = '{}'::jsonb
  AND COALESCE(normalized, '{}'::jsonb) = '{}'::jsonb;
UPDATE events_inbox
SET processing_status = 'processing'
WHERE event_id IN (
  SELECT event_id
  FROM events_inbox
  WHERE processing_status = 'ingested'
    AND NOT (
      COALESCE(source, 'unknown') = 'unknown'
      AND COALESCE(event_type, 'unknown') = 'unknown'
      AND COALESCE(payload, '{}'::jsonb) = '{}'::jsonb
      AND COALESCE(normalized, '{}'::jsonb) = '{}'::jsonb
    )
  ORDER BY received_at ASC
  LIMIT 10
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
)
RETURNING *;

{{ "INSERT INTO events_outbox (event_id, target, action, idempotency_key, payload) VALUES ('" + String($json.event_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + String($json.outbox_target || 'discord').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + String($json.outbox_action || 'notify').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + String($json.outbox_idempotency_key || $json.event_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + JSON.stringify($json.outbox_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO NOTHING;" }}
{{ "UPDATE events_inbox SET processing_status = 'processed' WHERE event_id = '" + String($json.event_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "';" }}
